ShortDescription.Value: Automatically revives abandoned buildings instead of letting them rot.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Building Reviver
Hate seeing abandoned husks in your city, but don't want to bulldoze them either? This mod brings them back to life.
## Features - Automatically **revives abandoned buildings**: clears the abandoned status, resets the building's condition, and puts the property back on the market so new occupants move in - Master on/off switch in Options → Mods → Building Reviver - **Adjustable sweep frequency** (1–64 scans per in-game day) - Session statistics, with a reset button - Lightweight: scans a few times per in-game day, no per-frame cost
## Notes - Revival only removes vanilla status components and resets condition, so it's save-safe - Safe to add or remove from a save at any time - If the underlying problem (land value, services, rent) persists, a building can relapse — this mod will simply revive it again on a later sweep - Condemned buildings are intentionally left alone: the game re-condemns them as long as the zoning under them is invalid, so "rescuing" them would achieve nothing. Fix the zoning instead. - The philosophical opposite of Auto Bulldozer — don't run both on the same city unless you want them fighting over the same buildings
